steps.title: Substitute the given condition into the function
steps.content:
We have $f(x) = -10x + b$ and we know that $f\left(\frac{2}{5}\right) = -53$. Substituting $x = \frac{2}{5}$:

$$-10 \cdot \frac{2}{5} + b = -53$$

Multiply: $-10 \cdot \frac{2}{5} = \frac{-20}{5} = -4$, so:

$$-4 + b = -53$$
